competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Features & Offerings

## Core Capabilities

GitHub Copilot functions as an AI accelerator across multiple workflows. The platform offers "inline suggestions and chat assistance in the IDE to code explanations and answers to docs" integrated throughout development lifecycles.

## Multi-Agent Support

Users can "assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex" to execute work autonomously. The system enables selection from leading language models optimized for speed, accuracy, or cost considerations.

## Workspace Customization

Copilot Spaces allow teams to "turn Copilot into a project expert" by creating shared knowledge repositories incorporating documentation and repository context for consistent team alignment.

## CLI & Terminal Integration

The command-line interface enables users to "direct Copilot in the terminal using natural language and watch it plan, build, and execute complex workflows."

## Code Review Automation

Organizations can enable Copilot code review across all pull requests, including those from unlicensed contributors billed as premium requests.

## Pricing Structure

**Free Tier**: 2,000 completions and 50 chat requests monthly
**Pro**: $10/month with unlimited inline suggestions and agent chats using GPT-5 mini
**Pro+**: $39/month with access to all models including Claude Opus 4.7

## Security & IP Protection

GitHub provides IP indemnification when duplication detection filters are enabled, protecting organizations from copyright concerns with "code segments over a certain length that match public code."

# GitHub Copilot: Key Features & Offerings

## Core Capabilities

GitHub Copilot functions as an AI accelerator across multiple workflows. The platform offers "inline suggestions and chat

changes.description: 定价结构首次明确列出：Pro $10/月（GPT-5 mini），Pro+ $39/月（含 Claude Opus 4.7）——顶级模型从 Haiku 4.5 升级为 Opus 4.7
changes.evidence: 「Pro+: $39/month with access to all models including Claude Opus 4.7」

changes.description: Code Review Automation 成为独立功能板块：支持对非授权用户的 PR 执行 AI 代码审查，按 premium request 计费
changes.evidence: 「Organizations can enable Copilot code review across all pull requests, including those from unlicensed contributors billed as premium requests」

changes.description: IP 保护/赔偿条款成为显著卖点：启用重复代码检测后提供版权免责保障，面向企业客户
changes.evidence: 「GitHub provides IP indemnification when duplication detection filters are enabled, protecting organizations from copyright concerns」

changes.description: 主页文案重构：「Command your craft」tagline 消失，改为功能罗列式页面；agent 特性表述从专属版块降为并列功能
changes.evidence: 旧版 baseline 有「Command your craft」及「Agents on GitHub」专属板块；本次抓取页面标题改为「Key Features & Offerings」，无独立 agent 板块

key_findings: Pro+ 定价明确（$39/月），Claude Opus 4.7 成为顶级模型入口；较上期 Haiku 4.5 引用有模型版本迭代
Code Review Automation 扩展至非授权贡献者，agent 辅助代码审查商业化路径更清晰
营销话语从 agent-first（「Agents on GitHub」专属板块）转向功能清单式，可能是 A/B 测试或页面重构
